evals.prompt: Build me a list of VP Engineering at Series B SaaS companies with 100-500 employees in the US
evals.expected_output: Structured ICP definition, Apollo filter recommendations, list sizing guidance, and segmentation strategy

assertions.name: icp_definition
assertions.description: Confirms and structures the ICP dimensions (title, funding stage, size, geography)

assertions.name: filter_strategy
assertions.description: Recommends specific filter settings for the data provider

assertions.name: segmentation
assertions.description: Suggests segmenting the list (by sub-industry, company size range, or signal)

assertions.name: quality_checks
assertions.description: Includes a quality validation step before launching outreach

evals.prompt: I need to find the buying committee at 20 target accounts in healthcare
evals.expected_output: ABM-focused approach mapping 3-5 contacts per account by role, with prioritization guidance

assertions.name: role_mapping
assertions.description: Identifies typical buying committee roles (economic buyer, champion, technical evaluator, etc.)

assertions.name: multi_threading
assertions.description: Recommends 3-5 contacts per account for multi-threaded outreach

assertions.name: abm_sizing
assertions.description: Acknowledges this is a targeted ABM list (25-100 contacts) not a volume play

evals.prompt: My prospect list has 3,000 contacts but my open rates are around 12% which is terrible. I built it in Apollo about 4 months ago targeting Directors and VPs of Marketing at mid-market SaaS companies in the US. Our ICP is really B2B SaaS companies with 200-1000 employees that use HubSpot. I'm running a cold outbound sequence in Apollo with 4 email steps. I haven't cleaned or re-verified the list since I built it. Is my list the problem or is it something else?
evals.expected_output: List quality diagnosis covering ICP fit, data freshness, segmentation, and email verification

assertions.name: quality_diagnosis
assertions.description: Evaluates list quality factors (ICP fit, title accuracy, company relevance)

assertions.name: email_verification
assertions.description: Recommends verifying email addresses and checking bounce rates

assertions.name: segmentation_check
assertions.description: Asks whether the list is segmented or if generic messaging is being sent to everyone
